title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Frankincense essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which target the root cause of swelling. The boswellic acids in frankincense oil inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes and cytokines, thereby reducing inflammation and discomfort. Additionally, frankincense oil's analgesic properties help to alleviate pain and stiffness associated with knee swelling.
